case_title: ALLY BANK VS. ENRIQUE S RODRIGUEZ ET AL

CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100009691) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK, ALLY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 HOURS
DECLARATION OF HOLLY FARLEY IN SUPPORT OF ALLYS REQUEST FOR COURTS JUDGMENT (CCP 585 (D)) (TRANSACTION ID # 100010548) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK, ALLY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-12-2015 CONTINUED TO DEC-16-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK, ALLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ENRIQUE S $10,621.86 PRINCIPAL, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $457.92 INTEREST, $425.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,904.78, 2011 KIA OPTIMA VIN# KNAGM4A79B517300. IF ALLY OBTAINS POSSESSION OF THE VEHICLE, ALLY WILL SELL THE VEHICLE AND WILL APPLY THE PROCEEDS FROM THE SALE TO THIS JUDGMENT AMOUNT. SEE SCAN DOCUMENTS
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BANK, ALLY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15124037), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK, ALLY SERVED APR-18-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ENRIQUE S

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-15-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100037807): DIPIERO, ANTHONY SUBSTITUTED FOR BARASCH, ADAM N AS ATTORNEY FOR BANK, ALLY
